comments: Approved. The contract is tightly bounded to the intended V0.8-M2 implementation slice and aligns with the recon packet. The scope is limited to: (1) generating default .agent-state/registry.json scaffolding via bin/agent-protocol-init, (2) creating src/mcp-server/src/router.ts for the LLM routing prompt/template against available .agent-state/workflows/*.yaml, and (3) updating documentation for the dynamic registry process. This matches the recon packet's in-scope definition of designing the registry schema plus the LLM Router prompt logic and creating router scaffolding. The out_of_scope clause correctly forbids the later-phase and non-M2 work called out in the recon packet and review brief: NO porting of the 17 workflows (M3), NO SubAgent review automation daemon logic (M4), NO removal of legacy tooling, and NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside standard M2 progression. The allowed_files list further reinforces the boundary by restricting implementation to src/mcp-server/src/router.ts, bin/agent-protocol-init, and documentation paths only. Minor note: required_outputs does not explicitly list documentation artifacts or bin/agent-protocol-init, but the governing scope and allowed_files sections still keep the implementation contract acceptably constrained.
